title: canarium costatum
intro: Canarium costatum, also known as the Java plum or Malabar plum, is a species of evergreen tree native to the tropical forests of Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which can help treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Canarium costatum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve digestive issues, and provide antioxidant properties. The herbal preparations of Canarium costatum include dried fruit, leaves, and bark, which can be used to make teas, infusions, and extracts for medicinal purposes.
